MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Roger Reynolds, Esq. 415-732-3788 for Plaintiff.
Ryan Kent, Esq. 415-479-4356 for Plaintiff.
Christopher Whitman, Deputy City Attorney 415-554-3800 of the Office of the City Attorney for DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING - A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, summary adjudication is denied. (see word minutes for full details)

Plaintiff to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and CCP 437c(g).(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
